title: Sakura Pack Vanilla
description:
A vanilla server compatible modpack.
Aimed at casual players
body:
This modpack is a 'vanilla' 1.20+ modpack.
Its purpose is to provide an enhanced experience for casual players.
This includes playing on pure vanilla or realms servers.

The modpack has the following features:

* Mini + Fullscreen Map (JourneyMap)
* All parts of what was optifine:
  - Zoom
  - more Performance options
  - Texture and entity features
* JEI to see what you can do with items and where to get them
* Jade to see what you are looking at
* Hud improvements (durability viewer, herld item, different framerate)
* Dark mode by mindful darkness
* Better mouse controls by mouse wheelie
* Comes with a performance oriented shader by default (MakeUp-UltraFast)
* Comes with two resourcepacks by default
* and many multiplayer related improvements

*The included resource packs have to be enabled manually.*
All mods come with set configuration files by default.
You only need to dial in your preferred vanilla settings and you are good to go.
